stories.title: Korda Now 5 Points From LPGA Hall of Fame (TIER 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Nelly Korda is 5 points from the LPGA Hall of Fame.

The Chevron win gave her 2 more. She now sits at 22 of 27 required.

Win one more major? She's in. She's 27 years old with no signs of slowing down. 🏆

#GolfFanrecap #LPGA #NellyKorda

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Only the 4th American woman since 1990 to win 3+ majors.

Meg Mallon. Betsy King. Patty Sheehan. Nelly Korda.

She's 5 points from the Hall of Fame and she just turned 27. The LPGA is in the presence of greatness. 🏌️‍♀️

#GolfFanrecap #LPGA

article.headline: Korda Is Now 5 Points From LPGA Hall of Fame — And She's Just Getting Started

stories.title: PGA Tour Under Fire — Scheffler AND McIlroy Miss Consecutive Signature Events (TIER 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Three consecutive $20M Signature Events.

No shared starts between Scheffler and McIlroy in any of them.

McIlroy skips Heritage + Cadillac. Scheffler skips Truist. No fines.

What's the point of a "Signature Event"? 🤔

#GolfFanrecap #PGATour

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Rory McIlroy is skipping his SECOND consecutive PGA Tour Signature Event.

Three $20M tournaments in 25 days. Not once do Scheffler and McIlroy share the same field.

Nobody gets fined. But that's the problem. 🤔

#GolfFanrecap #PGATour

article.headline: PGA Tour Schedule Under Fire: Scheffler and McIlroy Never Share a Signature Event Field

image_concepts.label: Image 2A
text_overlay: SCHEDULING CRISIS" (Bebas Neue, #FF5722) / "SCHEFFLER & McILROY NEVER SHARE A FIELD" (Montserrat, white)

stories.title: Cadillac Championship Preview — Scheffler Leads Depleted Field at Trump Doral (TIER 1)

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Trump Doral is BACK on the PGA Tour for the first time since 2016.

Cadillac Championship: April 30-May 3. $20M.

Scheffler IN. McIlroy, Åberg, Schauffele, Fitzpatrick OUT.

Someone is about to have the week of their career. 🏆

#GolfFanrecap #CadillacChamp

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Scheffler vs. The Field at Doral. Blue Monster. $20M.

The big guns are sitting out. Thursday could be a career-making moment for a player most casual fans haven't heard of.

Who do you think challenges Scheffler this week? 🐊

#GolfFanrecap #CadillacChamp

article.headline: Cadillac Championship Preview: Doral's Blue Monster Returns, Scheffler Leads Depleted Field

stories.title: LPGA Riviera Maya Open — Korda Goes for Back-to-Back Wins (TIER 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Nelly Korda goes wire-to-wire at Chevron, reclaims No. 1, moves to 5 points from the LPGA Hall of Fame...

And now she tees up AGAIN this Thursday at the Riviera Maya Open in Mexico.

Can she go back-to-back? 🌺

#GolfFanrecap #LPGA #NellyKorda

article.headline: Can Korda Go Back-to-Back? LPGA Heads to Mayakoba for Riviera Maya Open

image_concepts.label: Image 4A
text_overlay: RIVIERA MAYA OPEN" (Bebas Neue, #FF5722) / "KORDA: CAN SHE GO BACK-TO-BACK?" (Montserrat, white)

stories.title: LIV Golf Virginia — Rahm, Ripper GC, and the Next Showdown (TIER 2)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Rahm won Mexico City by 6. Now LIV Golf heads to Trump National DC.

LIV Virginia: May 7-10. Niemann defending. Ripper GC leads standings. Rahm coming in HOT.

This is a genuinely good field playing at a genuine championship course. ⛳

#GolfFanrecap #LIVGolf

article.headline: LIV Golf Virginia Preview: Rahm's Hot Streak Meets Niemann's Home Turf
